measurement_note: Size is n + e + S, where S is the exact number of feasible DFS calls in a four-leaf, ten-second star and remaining nodes are isolated. The three tiers have S = 9, 169, and 2729 for one, three, and five possible round trips. The reference maintains quality incrementally in O(n + e + S) work. A correct implementation that rescans all n visit counts at every return to node zero completes all tiers and fails by superlinear scaling.

cases.name: benchmark: one round trip and 5 nodes
benchmark: three round trips and 20 nodes
benchmark: five round trips and 80 nodes
